---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

The user pain or workflow this would address. Be concrete — a real scenario
where today's michi falls short.

## Proposed solution

What the feature would look like in practice. Mockups or pseudo-flows welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem. Why this one wins.

## Out of scope

Things the feature explicitly does not include, so the proposal stays focused.

## Additional context

Links to relevant prior art (other tools, papers, threads), or to the spec
file if the feature lives there.
